description: Detects excessive using directives, parameter overload, and low method cohesion in C#. Simplified from Rust: flags all using_directive nodes. Cannot apply the 15-import threshold (count_all_identifier_occurrences), detect parameter overload (>5 params), or low cohesion (methods not referencing 'this'). Structural detection only.

flag.message: using directive detected -- if the file has more than 15 using directives, consider splitting it into smaller files with fewer dependencies.
